title: Refactor format_lines/1 imperative loop into a pipe
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.ReportBuilder.format_lines/1` from test_fixtures/imperative_report_builder.ex. The original uses `Enum.each/2` and tries to rebind `lines = lines ++ [line]` — which is a no-op. Rewrite as a pipe using `Enum.map_join/3`: `orders |> Enum.map_join("\n", fn %{id: id, product: product, quantity: qty} -> "#{id}: #{product} x#{qty}" end)`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.ReportBuilder do ... end` with just format_lines.
tier_rationale: Knowing `Enum.map_join/3` is less common; Sonnet typically writes `Enum.map |> Enum.join` instead.
